title: PostgreSQL Vulnerability CVE-2024-10977
description:
• Report a Bug

    • CVE-2024-10977

    PostgreSQL libpq retains an error message from man-in-the-middle

    Client use of server error message in PostgreSQL allows a server not trusted under current SSL or GSS settings to furnish arbitrary non-NUL bytes to the libpq application.

description:
• Report a Bug

    • CVE-2021-32027

    Buffer overrun from integer overflow in array subscripting calculations

    While modifying certain SQL array values, missing bounds checks let authenticated database users write arbitrary bytes to a wide area of server memory.
